_meta.label: BackBone Labs
_meta.summary: Terra protocol building bLUNA (a LUNA liquid-staking token) and the BackBone (BBL) Marketplace. bLUNA is in TLA pools and our pricing path. Also operates the warlock DEX backend (SkeletonSwap data source).

facts.claim: bLUNA is a LUNA liquid-staking token issued by BackBone Labs. It has an on-chain hub with an exchange rate, queried via {state:{}} returning exchange_rate, used for redemption pricing (LUNA × ratio).
facts.notes: Hub query shape proven in our cron (matches legacy network-and-prices exactly). Docs site was unreachable from our environment at verification time; source_status=needs_source until a human confirms the canonical doc URL/section.

facts.claim: In our data bLUNA behaves as a clean staking derivative: its market price tracks its redemption value (LUNA × hub ratio) tightly — distinct from a strategy LST like arbLUNA.
facts.notes: Observed: bLUNA market ≈ redemption to ~0.002% in our runs. Mechanism doc link to be confirmed.

facts.claim: bLUNA's current on-chain hub exchange rate.
facts.notes: Live from the bLUNA hub; never hardcode.

facts.claim: BackBone Labs operates the BackBone (BBL) Marketplace on Terra, an NFT marketplace used in the aDAO ecosystem (BBL rarity ranks feed our NFT pipeline).
BackBone Labs hosts the warlock DEX backend (dex.warlock.backbonelabs.io), which is the data source our token-catalog uses for SkeletonSwap pool reserves and pair-implied pricing.
